content:
1. Generates a monthly report of articles with author details and aggregated word counts. It exists as a quick demo feature that was shipped.

2. The N+1 database query pattern (fetching authors one-by-one in a loop) and in-memory category filtering. Modifying it requires batching author fetches and pushing the filter to SQL. Also, `datetime.now()` is timezone-naive.

3. Whether to batch-fetch authors and push the category filter to SQL before production use (explicitly noted in the header comments).

4. Missing authors (crashing on `author["name"]`), memory exhaustion from loading all monthly articles into memory at once, timezone mismatches (naive `datetime.now()` vs potentially aware DB dates), and invalid `year`/`month` inputs.
